title: BG modpack
description: Hello thank you for looking at my modpack! this is the baguette smp modpack that is now open to the public as well
body:
Hello my name is  **_jake_**  you can call me **_123jaked22_** 

basically I made a minecraft smp called baguette smp and a modpack with it so here is the modpack that the smp has!

This is not the private mod pack this just has everything from season 1


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V_Sbecy7HCc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- 1. this is the PUBLIC version of the mod NOT the private!
- 2. you can do whatever you want with the mod pack idc 

BYE
